mapper.sql: select a.line_id, a.line_name, a.line_type, a.work_center, a.status, a.remark, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, b.site_id, b.site_name from mes_line a left join mes_site b on a.site_id = b.site_id
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT t.* FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT a.line_id AS lineId, d.line_name AS lineName, a.stage_id AS stageId, b.stage_name AS stageName, a.process_id AS processId, c.process_name AS processName, a.terminal_id AS terminalId, a.terminal_name AS terminalName, ( SELECT sop_page FROM mes_upload_terminal_page WHERE terminal_id = a.terminal_id AND stage_id = a.stage_id AND process_id = a.process_id AND line_id = #{lineId} AND material_id = #{materialId} AND type = 0 AND `status` = 2 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 0,1 ) AS sopPage FROM mes_terminal a LEFT JOIN mes_stage b ON b.stage_id = a.stage_id LEFT JOIN mes_process c ON c.process_id = a.process_id LEFT JOIN mes_line d ON d.line_id = a.line_id LEFT JOIN mes_upload_terminal_page k ON ( k.line_id = a.line_id AND k.stage_id = a.stage_id AND k.process_id = a.process_id AND k.terminal_id = a.terminal_id ) WHERE a.line_id = #{lineId} AND k.material_id = #{materialId} ) AS t WHERE (t.sopPage is not null or t.sopPage <> '')
mapper.delete:
delete from mes_line where line_id in
#{lineId}
mapper.select: SELECT line_id FROM mes_line WHERE create_time = (SELECT MAX(create_time) FROM mes_line)
